data.title: ITV plc Announces Updated Voting Rights and Capital Structure
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

ITV plc ( (GB:ITV) ) has shared an update.

ITV plc has announced its total voting rights and capital structure as of December 31, 2024, which includes 3,911,095,827 ordinary shares, with 120,479,277 held in treasury, resulting in 3,790,616,550 voting rights. This update is crucial for shareholders to determine their reporting requirements under the FCA’s Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

More about ITV plc

ITV plc is a prominent media company in the broadcasting industry, primarily focused on television production and broadcasting services.

data.title: Blue Owl Capital III Merger Gains Shareholder Support
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Blue Owl Capital Corporation III ( (OBDE) ).

Blue Owl Capital Corporation III (OBDE) and Blue Owl Capital Corporation (OBDC) announced that proxy advisory firms ISS and Glass Lewis recommend shareholders vote in favor of their merger. The merger aims to enhance OBDC’s scale and diversification, making it the second-largest publicly traded business development company by total assets. The combined entity is expected to benefit from improved trading dynamics and long-term expense savings from operating synergies, according to the advisors.

More about Blue Owl Capital Corporation III

Blue Owl Capital Corporation (OBDC) and Blue Owl Capital Corporation III (OBDE) are specialty finance companies focused on lending to U.S. middle-market companies. OBDC had investments in 219 portfolio companies with a fair value of $13.4 billion, while OBDE had investments in 185 portfolio companies valued at $4.2 billion. Both are regulated as business development companies under the Investment Company Act of 1940 and are part of Blue Owl’s Credit platform.

YTD Price Performance: 0%

Average Trading Volume: 324,559

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.81B

Find detailed analytics on OBDE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Vibropower Corp Faces Mandatory Cash Offer Shake-Up
data.description:
Vibropower Corporation Limited (SG:BJD) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Vibropower Corporation Limited is facing a mandatory conditional cash offer from Mr. Benedict Chen Onn Meng to acquire all issued and paid-up ordinary shares, excluding treasury shares and those already owned by him. This development follows a series of announcements confirming the offer’s unconditional status, indicating a significant shift in the company’s shareholding structure. Investors are likely to watch closely as the completion of this offer could impact Vibropower’s market dynamics.

data.title: Trillion Energy Announces Leadership Changes
data.description:
Trillion Energy International (TSE:TCF) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Trillion Energy International has announced the retirement of CEO Arthur Halleran, with interim CEO Sean Stofer taking the helm while a search for a permanent leader is underway. The company is focused on appointing a new CEO with expertise in capital markets to drive growth through existing and new energy ventures. Additionally, Burak Tolga Terzi has been appointed as Vice President, bringing extensive experience in the oil and gas industry.

data.title: Rivian Automotive Reports Strong Production and Delivery Numbers
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Rivian Automotive ( (RIVN) ) just unveiled an update.

Rivian Automotive reported its production and delivery figures for the fourth quarter and full-year 2024, with 12,727 vehicles produced and 14,183 delivered in Q4, and 49,476 produced and 51,579 delivered for the year. These numbers align with the company’s guidance, reflecting successful operational management despite previous supply constraints. Rivian announced the release of its Q4 financial results on February 20, 2025, which will be followed by a webcast addressing the company’s performance and future outlook.

More about Rivian Automotive

Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) is an American automotive manufacturer known for producing category-defining electric vehicles and accessories. The company focuses on innovative and technologically advanced products aimed at accelerating the global transition to zero-emission transportation. Rivian’s products cater to both consumer and commercial markets, emphasizing sustainability and adventure.

data.title: Alfa Financial Executives Exercise Sharesave Options and Transfer Shares
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Alfa Financial Software plc ( (GB:ALFA) ) has provided an announcement.

Alfa Financial Software Holdings PLC announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Duncan Magrath, and Chief Operating Officer, Matthew White, have exercised their share options under the company’s Sharesave Plan. Both executives subsequently transferred 11,718 shares each to their respective spouses at no cost. This transaction is disclosed in accordance with the UK’s Market Abuse Regulation, indicating transparency and compliance with market rules.

More about Alfa Financial Software plc

Alfa Financial Software Holdings PLC operates in the financial software industry, providing software solutions primarily focused on the automotive finance sector.

  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Carebook Technologies Inc. has agreed to be acquired by its majority shareholder, UIL Limited, for $0.10 per share, which is a 122% premium over its last trading price. data.title: Serviceware SE Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Serviceware SE ( (DE:SJJ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Serviceware SE has announced a change in voting rights, disclosed under Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG. MI Chelverton Equity Fund – European Select Fund, based in Chelmsford, UK, has acquired a 3.17% voting right stake in Serviceware SE as of January 11, 2024. This acquisition marks an increase from a previous holding of 0.00%, indicating heightened interest and involvement from the European Select Fund in Serviceware’s operations.

More about Serviceware SE

Serviceware SE is a company based in Idstein, Germany, operating in the software services industry. It is listed on stock exchanges including the Regulated Market in Frankfurt and the Free Markets in Berlin, Düsseldorf, Stuttgart, and Tradegate. The company’s primary services include providing software solutions that enhance service management and improve business processes.
